name: Archotech Rush Build (Ancient Nano Missile Cloud)
description: A rush build focused on rushing ancient nano missile cloud launchers early game using Remnants origin. The build maximizes society research to quickly unlock tier 3 archotech weapons, then uses artillery corvettes with 100% shield/armor penetration to dominate early game. Can fully annihilate Grand Admiral AI and potentially competitive in multiplayer.

strategy.key_building: Faculty of Archaeo Studies (from Remnants origin) - provides +100% archaeotech research speed, +100% minor artifact capacity, converts biologists to archaeo-engineers
strategy.early_game: Focus on maximizing society research with Civil Education (educators replace enforcers), Parliamentary System (instant factions for unity/science), and all research bonuses. Build State Academy for +0.5 tech from each civilian.
strategy.tech_path: Rush 6 tier 1 techs, then 6 tier 2 techs, then unlock Ancient Nano Missile Cloud Launcher (tier 3). Prioritize society research throughout.
strategy.military: Once Ancient Nano Missiles unlocked: Build artillery corvettes with Ancient Nano Missile Cloud Launchers (100% accuracy, 100% shield/armor penetration, 0-100 range). These weapons bypass shields and armor completely, dealing damage directly to hull.
strategy.civic_changes: Late game: Replace Parliamentary System with Beacon of Liberty, keep Civil Education or swap to Crowdsourced Research for faction research output
strategy.why_it_works: Ancient Nano Missiles have 4.7 average damage vs 2.35 for tier 1 missiles, with perfect accuracy and 100% penetration. Artillery computer keeps corvettes at max range (100) while they kite and destroy enemies without taking damage.

dlcs: Plantoids Species Pack (for some civics access)
